reviews.review_title: Totally black screen on T mobile S7
reviews.review_description: Can only hear sound but can not see anything

developer_response.body: Hi, we are sorry to make you uncomfortable. We are trying solving the problem and will fix it as soon as possible. Thank you.

reviews.review_description: The Oculus Quest version is really fun!

U can earn currency and stars and get new skills and toys and upgrade them. I played it about 2 hours now and think it will get dotzends of hours. Very little Oculus go games mean so much fun to me. 

And I'm 36 years old AND I never play tower defense games normalways. 

I would suggest to try it!
This game is well polished fun and challenging. Multiplayer would be great.

reviews.review_title: Fun game, lots of play time
reviews.review_description:
This is a well made game. Tons of levels, extra challenge if you want 3 stars on each level. Level design changes a lot and keeps it fresh. I have really enjoyed what I have played so far.

My criticisms would be: i feel that i have to look down too much at the table (which strains my neck with a gear vr hanging from it). Would be nice to look straight ahead but still be looking down at the table in vr. Also, i feel that this game would also be a fun mobile experience, and im not sure it benefits as much from vr as some other experiences in the store.

Still, it is a fun play and i certainly do not regret the purchase.
I love all those defense games but this is just to easy and to short
Fun game. Graphics are good and it’s perfect for those sit down play sessions.
Simply put,  it's just fun to play.
Fun and love the graphics.

Loved this game, I played it on the quest and loved it. It's a much different paced game to the usual FPS games that I'm used to. I have a question though, has anyone got 3 stars on stage 36?! If so how on earth did you do it?! :P

reviews.review_title: Good game - one to keep/show others
reviews.review_description: Really good game, only gripe being that it is sometimes hard to hit or turn over the extend bar sign when controller is set to left handed play (otherwise 5 star).
I bought this app for my 7 year old. It took some time to figure out the purpose of the game but my child got the hang of it and still seems to be enjoying it now.

Lotsa fun.  Simple but you gotta love it.  

I am a few stars from perfect 152.   The 2 on the last Boss are quiet hard..  Nice to have a few bonus stages.  

In total, maybe 9 hours playing time- well worth it

This is so addictive, simple easy game, I've only just started playing it and already I'm hooked, looks like there are lots of levels to get through, and it's good that you can upgrade the toys, love it.
I play on oculus go and it's fun but after a while of playing everything turned to slow motion and then it's boring.
I like this game because I’m getting tired of shooting stuff lol. I’m a beginner so I’m sure more advanced people would like something more detail. The controls work good.
Lovely little game. Not too easy, not too hard. Played it on the quest
Played on my quest, works flawlessly, worth the 5 bucks compared to many quest games.
Very fun and keeps you coming back.  Good graphics and concept.
Really fun, lots of levels and looks great. Great break from first person games.
